series_metadata.series_description: Records that document the process to select an operator for a facility. Records may include: applications and supporting documentation; applicant information records provided to the selection panel; facility announcement; selection scoring form; and, other miscellaneous documentation acquired during the selection process.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Maintain records for at least ninety (90) days from the date the Operator is chosen and accepts the facility. Destroy when no longer of administrative value. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: Maintain records for at least ninety (90) days from the date the Operator is chosen and accepts the facility. Destroy when no longer of administrative value. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
